Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testuser" and password "testpassword".
2. Click "Login".
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the home page.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Invalid Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testuser" and password "wrongpassword".
2. Click "Login".
3. Verify that the user is prompted to enter valid credentials.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message and remains on the login page.

Title: Empty Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Leave both fields empty.
2. Click "Login".
3. Verify that the user is prompted to enter valid credentials.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message and remains on the login page.

Title: Create Compito
Test Data:
- Compito name: New Task
- Description: Description of the task
- Region: Region
- Province: Province
- City: City
- Active: True
Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza".
2. Verify that the coordinator is authenticated.
3. Enter the compito details.
4. Click "Crea emergenza".
5. Verify that the compito is created successfully.
Expected Result: Compito is created and displayed in the system.

Title: View Emergenza
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza".
2. Verify that the coordinator is authenticated.
3. Select the emergenza.
4. Verify that the emergenza details are displayed.
Expected Result: Emergenza details are displayed.

Title: View Emergenza with Unauthenticated Coordinator
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza".
2. Verify that the coordinator is unauthenticated.
3. Verify that the system shows an error message.
Expected Result: System shows an error message and redirects to the login page.

Title: Terminate Emergenza
Test Steps:
1. Click "Termina emergenza".
2. Verify that the coordinator is authenticated.
3. Enter the emergenza ID.
4. Verify that the emergenza is terminated.
5. Verify that the system displays the number of terminated emergencies.
Expected Result: Emergenza is terminated and the system displays the number of terminated emergencies.

Title: Terminate Emergenza with Invalid ID
Test Steps:
1. Click "Termina emergenza".
2. Verify that the coordinator is authenticated.
3. Enter an invalid emergenza ID.
4. Verify that the system shows an error message.
Expected Result: System shows an error message and prompts for a valid emergenza ID.

Title: Register New User

- Password: newpassword
- Confirm Password: newpassword
- Name: John

- Cellphone: 1234567890

- City: City
Test Steps:

2. Enter all required user details.
3. Confirm the password.

Expected Result: User is registered and can log in.

Title: Register User with Mismatched Passwords
Test Data:
- Username: newuser
- Password: newpassword
- Confirm Password: wrongpassword
- Name: John
- Surname: Doe
- Cellphone: 1234567890
- Email: john.doe@example.com
- Region: Region
- Province: Province
- City: City
Test Steps:
1. Click "Register".
2. Enter all required user details.
3. Confirm the password with a mismatch.
4. Click "Register".
5. Verify that the system shows an error message.
Expected Result: System shows an error message and prompts for matching passwords.

Title: Assign User to Compito
Preconditions: User is authenticated and compito exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Assign User to Compito".
2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Select the compito and user.
4. Click "Assign".
5. Verify that the user is assigned to the compito.
Expected Result: User is successfully assigned to the compito.

Title: Assign User to Non-Existent Compito
Test Steps:
1. Click "Assign User to Compito".
2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Enter a non-existent compito ID.
4. Click "Assign".
5. Verify that the system shows an error message.
Expected Result: System shows an error message and prompts for a valid compito ID.

Title: View User's Risguarda
Test Steps:
1. Click "View User's Risguarda".
2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Select the user.
4. Verify that the user's risguarda is displayed.
Expected Result: User's risguarda is displayed.

Title: Mark Task as Completed
Preconditions: User is authenticated and compito exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Mark Task as Completed".
2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Select the compito and user.
4. Click "Complete".
5. Verify that the compito is marked as completed.
Expected Result: Compito is marked as completed.

Title: Mark Non-Existent Task as Completed
Test Steps:
1. Click "Mark Task as Completed".
2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Enter a non-existent compito ID.
4. Click "Complete".
5. Verify that the system shows an error message.
Expected Result: System shows an error message and prompts for a valid compito ID.

Title: View User's Coordinates
Test Steps:
1. Click "View User's Coordinates".
2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Select the user.
4. Verify that the user's coordinates are displayed.
Expected Result: User's coordinates are displayed.

Title: Logout User
Test Steps:
1. Click "Logout".
2. Verify that the user is logged out.
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the login page.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Delete Compito

2. Verify that the user is authenticated.
3. Select the compito.
4. Click "Delete".
5. Verify that the compito is deleted.
Expected Result: Compito is deleted.

4. Click "Delete".
